original: JoyCo’s premiere less-than-lethal self-defense weapon, the Mk. VII Goovolver is a compact, brightly-colored gun loaded with bulky capsules. When fired, the weapon launches a small ‘rocket’ capsule at a target, shattering harmlessly on impact but releasing a small Galotian hybrid species. The freshly delivered creature will sexually stimulate the target until submission occurs.\n\nA small label on the side of the barrel indicates that the Galotians are not harmed by the process.
